title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that enables production-grade clusters with a single click while maintaining customization and control. It handles both control plane and data plane management automatically and integrates with Karpenter for auto scaling and cost optimization.
